summary: Verified all 4 MRN label bug fixes. PatientDetailPage shows 'MRN:' label, PatientsPage shows 'MRN:' label in cards, MeetingDetailPage patient cards show 'MRN:' label, and patient creation in meeting correctly maps 'mrn' field to 'patient_id_number' for backend.
seed_data_creation: Used existing test data from iteration_7
context_for_next_testing_agent: All MRN label fixes verified. The app correctly shows 'MRN:' instead of 'ID:' in PatientDetailPage, PatientsPage, and MeetingDetailPage patient cards. Patient creation in meeting dialog correctly maps frontend 'mrn' field to backend 'patient_id_number' field.

bug_1_patient_detail_page.description: Change 'ID:' label to 'MRN:' in PatientDetailPage header
bug_1_patient_detail_page.evidence: Screenshot shows 'MRN: MRN-BUG-001' under patient name 'Test BugPatient'

bug_2_patients_page.description: Change 'ID:' label to 'MRN:' in PatientsPage patient cards
bug_2_patients_page.evidence: Screenshot shows patient cards with 'MRN: MRN-BUG-001' and 'MRN: 676766'

bug_3_meeting_patient_cards.description: Patient cards in meeting show 'MRN:' label
bug_3_meeting_patient_cards.evidence: Screenshot shows meeting patient cards with 'MRN: MRN-BUG-001' and 'MRN: 676766'

bug_4_patient_creation_field_mapping.description: Patient creation in meeting dialog maps 'mrn' to 'patient_id_number' for backend
bug_4_patient_creation_field_mapping.evidence: Code review confirms patient_id_number: newPatient.mrn mapping at line 323. Create New Patient form shows MRN field with placeholder 'MRN123456'
